title: Amazon to add 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for sellers as Iran war drives up energy prices
summary_full: With the Iran war now in its fifth week, Amazon said it's adding a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for third-party sellers in the U.S. and Canada.
summary_public: With the Iran war now in its fifth week, Amazon said it's adding a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for third-party sellers in the U.S. and Canada.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war drives up energy prices
